case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP vs. COOPER, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, ROBERT COOPER, PEGGY CANTWELL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE PRO TEM, JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERNECE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT ROBERT COOPER AND PEGGY CANTWELL COOPER AS FOLLOWS: DEFTS. TO VACATE ON/OR BEFORE MIDNIGHT 3/6/94, DEFTS. TO LEAVE KEYS AND LETTER OF ACKNOWLEDGMENT THAT THEY HAVE VACATED IN MANAGERS MAIL BOX ON OR BEFORE 3/6/94. DEFT. TO PAY $2,600 IN FORM OF CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER PAYABLE TO PARKMERCED CO. ON/OR BEFORE 5PM, FRIDAY 3/4/94 MAILED TO JEFFREY MARGULIES, AT 100 BUSH ST. SUITE 925, IF DEFTS. DEFAULT IN THE ABOVE CONDITIONS. PLT. ENTITLED TO IMMED. POSS. PLUS $1,000 LIQUIDATED DAMAGES. PROPERTY REMAINING AFTER 3/6 DEEMED ABANDONED,IT IS UNDERSTOOD THAT THE SECUR. DEPOSIT IS SPLIT & THE $2,600 INCL. THE REBATE OF 1/2 OF DEFT. SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO FURTHER STAYS, NO CLAIM OF POSS. PLT'S ATTY TO PREPARE STIP. AND JUDGMENT
